case_title: ACAR, KAZIM Z./KZA FINANCIAL, INC. VS TELE-TEN MARKETING

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION APR-08-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAY-09-2005 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 DEFENDANT CHALLENGES VENUE. COURT FINDS THAT VENUE IS PROPER. CONTINUED FOR FURTHER TRIAL.

WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT TELE-TEN MARKETING
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
